worktree_state.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
  "id": "feedback",
  "name": "Feedback Module",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "status": "stub",
  "description": "Müşteri geri bildirimi - anketler, yorumlar ve puanlama sistemi",

  "type": "feature",
  "category": "customer-experience",

  "author": {
    "name": "E-Menum Team",
    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
  },

  "compatibility": {
    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },

  "dependencies": {
    "modules": ["auth", "organization", "order"],
    "optional": ["notification", "analytics", "customer"]
  },

  "provides": {
    "services": ["IFeedbackService", "ISurveyService"],
    "events": [
      "feedback.submitted",
      "feedback.responded",
      "survey.created",
      "survey.completed",
      "review.published"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "feedback:view",
      "feedback:respond",
      "feedback:configure",
      "survey:create",
      "survey:view"
    ]
  },

  "tier": {
    "minimum": "starter",
    "features": {
      "starter": ["basic_ratings", "feedback_collection"],
      "professional": ["basic_ratings", "feedback_collection", "surveys", "reports"],
      "business": ["basic_ratings", "feedback_collection", "surveys", "reports", "auto_responses", "sentiment_analysis"],
      "enterprise": ["basic_ratings", "feedback_collection", "surveys", "reports", "auto_responses", "sentiment_analysis", "nps_tracking", "custom_surveys"]
    }
  },

  "plannedFeatures": [
    "Star ratings",
    "Text feedback collection",
    "Custom surveys",
    "Feedback responses",
    "Sentiment analysis",
    "NPS (Net Promoter Score)",
    "Feedback reports",
    "Auto-response templates",
    "Google Reviews integration"
  ],

  "estimatedRelease": "Q3 2026"
}
